title: MikroTik RouterBOARD E60iUGS, hEX S
description: MikroTik hEX S is a compact, powerful, and affordable wired router that is an ideal choice for smart homes or small offices. The device features 5 Gigabit Ethernet ports , with Ether1 supporting PoE-in and Ether5 offering PoE-out , allowing you to power another device directly from the router. The PoE-out voltage matches the input voltage supplied to the router. One of its main advantages is the 2.5G SFP port , which enables you to fully utilize high-speed connections â such as to a NAS… Inside, you'll find a dual-core ARM processor running at 950 MHz and 512 MB of RAM , providing enough power for more demanding networking tasks. The RouterOS v7 operating system offers advanced features such as VLANs, bonding, traffic shaping, advanced routing , and more â all without the need to purchase additional licenses or upgrades hEX S device 24V / 1.2A power adapter
